title: Historical Archives of Užice
summary: The Historical Archives of Užice (Serbian: Историјски архив Ужице) are the primary institution responsible for preservation of archival materials in most of the Zlatibor District and southern parts of Moravica District located in Užice, Serbia. The archives are primarily serving municipalities of Užice, Bajina Bašta, Kosjerić, Požega, Arilje, Ivanjica, Čajetina, Nova Varoš, Priboj, Prijepolje. In 2009, the archives were moved into new purpose-built building housing archival material and administration.
